== Notes for [[Item:Q98326|Q98326]] ==

David ,

son of Shemaiah and nn to: nn

1) Shechaniah to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Da-ud-ben-Shemaya/6000000000795550634?through=6000000014925917937

David ,

son of Shemaiah and nn to:

nn

1) Shechaniah to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBB1CF441EFBBF89829A6488A4D8CAA
geni:6000000000795550634

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
